overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival game showing a character walking along an abandoned mountain road. The character passes derelict military and civilian vehicles while surrounded by rocky hills and pine forests under a partly cloudy afternoon sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned mountain road with military checkpoint

events.description: character moves from asphalt road onto dirt shoulder on the right side
large military truck temporarily blocks view of the road ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the road shoulder approaching an abandoned military truck

notable_agents.action: abandoned military truck parked on the roadside shoulder
red sedan parked further down the road

entered.detail: steep rocky hillside covered with sparse vegetation rising on the left side of the road
dense evergreen trees covering the upper slopes of the mountain
wooden utility poles with wires running parallel to the road
hazy mountain peaks visible in the far background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an abandoned mountain road with rocky cliffs on the left and scattered pine trees. The camera follows from behind as the character drifts onto the dirt shoulder to approach a large abandoned military truck parked on the right side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: vehicle parking area in mountain pass

events.description: character steps back onto asphalt and weaves between parked vehicles
exiting the dense vehicle cluster into more open road ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through the abandoned vehicle parking area between derelict trucks and cars

notable_agents.action: red pickup truck abandoned on the left side of the road
white pickup truck parked on the right roadside

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a cluster of abandoned vehicles including a red pickup on the left and white pickup on the right. The rocky cliff face looms closer on the left as the character navigates the asphalt surface, transitioning from the congested parking area toward open road.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain highway with valley views

events.description: speed limit sign becomes visible on the right side of the road
character passes the speed limit sign and a blue pickup truck on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the open road away from the vehicle cluster toward distant mountains

notable_agents.action: blue pickup truck parked near the speed limit sign

entered.detail: white rectangular road sign showing speed limit 45 mounted on a metal pole
expansive view of the valley opening up between the mountain ranges ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open stretch of mountain highway with expansive valley views ahead. A speed limit sign becomes visible on the right, which the character passes along with a blue pickup truck. The road continues toward distant mountain ranges under a partly cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate mountain road that transitions from a cluttered area of derelict vehicles into an expansive highway vista. It begins with the character walking beside rocky cliffs and scattered pine trees, drifting onto the dirt shoulder to approach a large abandoned military truck. As the character navigates through a congested cluster of vehicles, including a red pickup and a white pickup, the rocky cliff face looms closer on the left. The scene then opens up as the character moves past the wreckage and back onto the asphalt, passing a speed limit sign and a blue pickup truck. Finally, the road stretches forward into an open highway, revealing wide valley views and distant mountain ranges under a partly cloudy sky.
